ogTitle: Daadenning Creek vs Daglish: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Daadenning Creek and Daglish.
heading: Daadenning Creek vs Daglish — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Daadenning Creek, Western Australia and Daglish, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Daglish has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Daadenning Creek (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Daadenning Creek or Daglish safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Daadenning Creek has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Daglish scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Daadenning Creek scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Daglish scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Daadenning Creek or Daglish?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Daglish has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
